summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AFI v3.0 platform - all backend APIs and frontend views working correctly

backend_issues.notes: All 10 backend API endpoints tested successfully with 100% pass rate

frontend_issues.notes: All 5 views (BRIEF, RADAR, INTEL, FEED, ALERTS) working correctly with proper navigation and v3 features

passed_tests: Backend health endpoint returns OK status
Demo trigger POST /api/demo/trigger with AAPL ticker completes within 30 seconds
Migration endpoint GET /api/migrate returns proper SQL for v3 tables
Telegram setup endpoint GET /api/telegram/setup returns expected response
Signals endpoint GET /api/signals returns signals with v3 enrichment fields
Radar endpoint GET /api/radar returns upcoming filing data
Intel endpoint GET /api/intel/TSLA returns company dossier data
Genome endpoint GET /api/genomes returns list or expected error
Brief endpoint GET /api/brief returns daily market brief
Authentication working with demo2@afi.dev / demopass123 credentials
Dashboard loads with 5-view navigation (BRIEF, RADAR, INTEL, FEED, ALERTS)
FEED view shows signal cards with confidence bars and watch buttons
BRIEF view shows daily brief with market status indicators
INTEL view has functional search bar and ANALYZE button
ALERTS view has Telegram/Email toggles and confidence threshold slider
RADAR view displays weekly calendar grid for upcoming filings
Signal card interactions (watch buttons, confidence bars) working correctly
Navigation between all 5 views functioning properly
